thread.title_full: Experts describe Scott Bessent as a credible, safe pick for US Treasury secretary | | news-journal.com

author: Drew Angerer
title: Experts describe Scott Bessent as a credible, safe pick for US Treasury secretary | | news-journal.com
text: Experts describe Scott Bessent as a credible, safe pick for US Treasury secretary - Drew Angerer - Updated Tags As featured on US President-elect Donald Trump is expected to pick billionaire Scott Bessent as his Treasury secretary, media outlets reported Friday, choosing the hedge fund manager to help execute an agenda promising tax cuts and tariffs. US President-elect Donald Trump on Friday named billionaire Scott Bessent as his Treasury secretary, choosing the hedge fund manager to help execute an agenda promising tax cuts and tariffs. Hedge fund manager Scott Bessent is a credible, safe choice for US Treasury secretary -- and one that is likely positive for markets -- observers said Saturday following President-elect Donald Trump's highly anticipated nomination.
